summary: E-commerce project with product pages. Working on dynamic price and stock updates when a variant is selected.

existing_features.title: On the ProductDetail page, when the user selects a variant, dynamically update the displayed price and stock availability to reflect the selected variant's price and stock values without a page reload.
On the ProductCard component, when the user selects a variant (if variant selection is exposed on the card), update the displayed price and stock badge to reflect the selected variant's values.

new_feature_requests.summary: Dynamic price and stock updates when a product variant is selected
